item.title: SkySportsGolf: Sky Sports Golf @SkySportsGolf · 28min Matt Fitzpatrick secured a second PGA Tour win of the season after overcoming a f
item.description: Sky Sports Golf @SkySportsGolf · 28min Matt Fitzpatrick secured a second PGA Tour win of the season after overcoming a final-round wobble to claim play-off victory over world No. 1 Scottie Scheffler at the RBC Heritage 3 15 1 mil

item.title: BenColeyGolf: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 46min The dullest argument in football. If City don’t win the league it will not be because th
item.description: Ben Coley @BenColeyGolf · 46min The dullest argument in football. If City don’t win the league it will not be because they celebrated winning the biggest game of the season. I have no idea what point this serves except to highlight which pundits have nothing interesting to say about a very interesting sport. Cita BBC Sport @BBCSport · 9h Were Manchester City's celebrations today excessive? 1 11 2 mil

item.title: SteveThePunter: Steve Rawlings @SteveThePunter · 39min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Just bonkers. Who wouldn’t celebrate winning a game
item.description: Steve Rawlings @SteveThePunter · 39min En respuesta a @BenColeyGolf Just bonkers. Who wouldn’t celebrate winning a game of that magnitude. Arsenal were very good yesterday btw. Very unlucky not to get something imo. Completely different attitude to two years ago when they came for a 0-0 that ultimately wasn’t enough anyway 1 191

item.title: chambleebrandel: Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 2h As have many mafia members and drug dealers. Cita ARMY OF FROGS NEWS @MAGADONIAN
item.description: Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 2h As have many mafia members and drug dealers. Cita ARMY OF FROGS NEWS @MAGADONIAN17 · 2h En respuesta a @chambleebrandel He has made more money than you and great great grandkids will ever make 6 21 7 mil

item.title: chambleebrandel: Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 2h He beat players who sacrificed their careers to play on a tour that was hotter co
item.description: Brandel Chamblee @chambleebrandel · 2h He beat players who sacrificed their careers to play on a tour that was hotter cooked than eaten. Cita Eddie “Ice” Lowery @Eddiethecaddy · 7h Jon Rahm wins 2026 LIV Mexico 14 2 47 11 mil
